roa.docketEntryComment: DA'S OPPOSITION TO DEFT'S PC1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED
DEFT MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE UNDER PC 1538,5 FILED
A CAD TAPE IS RELEASED TO DPD, H NGUYEN

/TWS/CH1:CJ 15 D/CTS: 2/SWAPD: 09-15-14/VF2:150/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/CTORD:THE SAME SENTENCE IS IMPOSED ON BOTH COUNTS ONE AND TWO/CCC: COUNTS ONE AND TWO/CTORD: THE COURT SECURITY FEE AND ICNA FEES ARE IMPOSED ON BOTH COUNTS FORA TOTAL OF $80 AND $60 RESPECTIVELY/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO PAY RESTITUTION, IF ANY, AS DETERMINED BY PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION/BE/CONTD PTD PROG RPT/CGTW/PROGPTD: 10-14-14/CONTD:PRETRIAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/
/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/GTWM/987,2/X:A FEE HEARING IS ORDERED,/X:COUNSEL RESERVES THE RIGHT TODEMUR,/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:PTD PROG RPT RE RESTITUTION/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: RESTITUTION RESERVED  /
/CAL  TRIAL/TEXT DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA(S) OF NL/DEFT ADV NL: 1 AND 2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/CAL TRIAL & MTS/TEXT TRANS TO DEPT 10/TRANS 10 FORTHWITH FOR DISPO/
